Notice And Motion To Transfer Venue; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jul-07-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RONALD E. SCHWARTZ Motion to Transfer Venue from San Francisco Superior Court, to Superior Court of the State of California, County of Los Angeles - Central District of Los Angeles. Appearances: Michael S. Keck, Esq., Law Offices of C.L. Keck, (415) 861-2267, appearing for Plaintiff. No opposition to the Motion. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. The Court also includes in its Order a waiver of costs for transfer fees. Order signed in open Court. (302/HEK)JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077
